inline_comments.message: why second registration is required for CBS? Also the service address should be mapped to cluster-ip as emailed little earlier

I think some components look up using a hard-coded "config_binding_service" and some components use the CONFIG_BINDING_SERVICE variable passed in by the plugin, which is set to "config-binding-service".   This way, both cases are covered.

The ClusterIP is not known at the time this code is running. Kubernetes has not yet done the deployment.  The name should be sufficient to find CBS--it has been sufficient in my other testing.   Not sure what is happening in the environment where you are working.
